params.subIds: Array of subscription IDs to process

returns.ready: Array of subscription IDs that can be processed

modifySubscription(uint256,uint256,uint2.details: Only subscriber can modify, takes effect after next payment

pauseSubscription(uint256).details: Useful for disputes, temporary suspension, etc.

resumeSubscription(uint256).details: Only subscriber can resume (prevents merchant abuse)

batchProcessPayments(uint256[]).notice: Batch process multiple subscription payments (gas efficient for keepers)

canProcess(uint256).notice: Check if subscription can be processed now

getMerchantSubscriptions(address).notice: Get all subscriptions for a merchant

getNextPaymentInfo(uint256).notice: Get next payment info for UI

getReadyForProcessing().notice: Get all subscriptions ready for processing (for keepers)

getUserSubscriptions(address).notice: Get all subscriptions for a user

setDAO(address).notice: Set DAO address (only current DAO can change)
